titleStmt.title: SII 24.56: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 56. (A.R. No. 132 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Seems to be a gift of gold by Sēnāpatigaḷ Rājēndrachōḻa Muṉaiyadaraiyar towards garlands, ghee for lamp, etc. The wording in line 5 indicates the regnal year of the king as either 14 or 16.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkop paruvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayarmuṉaik kontaḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷ vali kāṭṭip porpaṟi naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilap pāvaiyum tanimaiyun tavira
Urimaiyir cūṭit taṉnaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkolticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila Eṅkaṇum tanātu veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattu pūpālar tirai viṭutanta kalañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅkaliṟ piṟkulappiṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetir koṭā vik ṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena
Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟiṉa vīramuṅ kiṭappaeṟina malaikaḷum mutuku ṭain toṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷum ḷaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap pala pala mutukum payantetir māṟiya jayapperuntiruvum paḻi Ukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷoroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamumiḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamentum pāṇi I k koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇ
ḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poru parittala riyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polat tan peruñceṉai Evi pañcavaraivarum poruta porkaḷattañ[ci ] ṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭaṭipaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai ñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiya(jaya)stampam ticai tti muttiṉ calāpamum muttamiṭ potiyilum mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiyccaya yuṅ kaikkoṇṭa ruḷit te
malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāverellām tani vicum peṟa māveriya tan varutaniṟ ṟalai varaik kuṟukalar kulaiyak paṭum neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟai koḷ siṅ ppārmicai mevalar viḷaṅka vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesarivanmarānac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu patinnā
va vaḷanāṭṭu nelma koṭṭur koṭa yān Āyar koḻuntu Aḻakiyama nāpatikaḷ rājentracoḻa muṉaiyataraiyar kku kuṭutta vā
ṅka kuḻinūṟu san=tiya koṇṭa cārttiyaruḷum vāca veṇ ttak kuṭutta Aḻakiya maṇavāḷan veḷḷi ṭṭi paṇṭi runāḻi Uḻakkāka Āṇṭu varai veṇṭum Eṇṇai Iru patteḻu nāḻikku pon I cāṭi
yuṅkoṇṭu Ip� ṇai tiṅkaḷ toṟum Aṭṭakkaṭavatā kavum Ipparicu cantrirātittaval nānum En varggattārum ce Ippaṭi celuttuvikkak kaṭavom tiruvaraṅkattu sabhai- yom Itu śrīvayiṣṇavarakṣai
svastiśrī pukaḻStops abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 24.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
